evidence.command:
bash -c set -e
# rollback flip: default(rebuilt) blocks, legacy flag blocks, unset rebuilt again; routing identity tests prove which table serves
echo "{\"tool_name\":\"Bash\",\"tool_input\":{\"command\":\"rm -rf /\"}}" | bun bin/ditto hook pre-tool-use && exit 1 || [ $? -eq 2 ]
echo "{\"tool_name\":\"Bash\",\"tool_input\":{\"command\":\"rm -rf /\"}}" | DITTO_HOOKS_LEGACY=1 bun bin/ditto hook pre-tool-use && exit 1 || [ $? -eq 2 ]
bun test src/hooks/rebuilt/hook-routing.test.ts 2>&1 | tail -3
git diff --quiet HEAD -- hooks/hooks.json
echo AC1-OK
